data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Auditability of tier at time of access', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for auditability, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or data related to tier access or audit logs. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence needed to confirm the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of auditability checks for tier at time of access.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auditability of tier access
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auditability of tier at time of access.
